message:
fix(curate): Include maturity/state checks in conflict detection skip

The conflict detection was only checking `deprecated` flag but should
also skip bullets with `maturity === "deprecated"` or `state === "retired"`
for consistency with the isDeprecated helper used elsewhere in the file.

This prevents false positive conflict warnings against retired/deprecated
bullets that are no longer active.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
